channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lindsey Vonn took all of 20 seconds to regain her former speed in comeback race at age 40
item.description: ST. MORITZ, Switzerland (AP) — Maybe it was nerves for her first World Cup race back in nearly six years. Maybe it was a bumpier course than she's used to racing on. Maybe it was some wrong lines or angles.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Oregon’s Dana Altman, Stanford’s Kyle Smith reflect on renewal of old Pac-12 rivalry in San Jose
item.description: After reviving a bygone Pac-12 matchup, Oregon and Stanford coaches reminisced about days gone by and the challenges ahead in Big Ten and ACC men's basketball
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Steve Kerr sent a message to Warriors in highlighting one key play vs. Timberwolves
item.description: Even after a win over Minnesota, Steve Kerr had pointed remarks for his team about their style of play around Steph Curry.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Jazz win back-to-back games for first time this season
item.description: BROOKLYN, N.Y. (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time since April, the Utah Jazz are on a winning streak. Lauri Markkanen scored 21 points, Collin Sexton and Svi Mykhailiuk each had 18 points, and the Utah Jazz beat the Brooklyn Nets 105-94 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: JuJu Watkins and No. 7 USC hold off Paige Bueckers and fourth-ranked UConn 72-70
item.description: HARTFORD, Conn. (AP) — JuJu Watkins scored 25 points and No. 7 USC recovered from blowing a 18-point lead in the second half to beat Paige Bueckers and fourth-ranked UConn 72-70 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas holds off Clemson's comeback to advance in College Football Playoff
item.description: The Texas Longhorns took care of business against the Clemson Tigers Saturday to advance to the quarterfinals of the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Deion Sanders says he'll 'make sure' Travis Hunter plays offense and defense in NFL
item.description: Travis Hunter parlayed his offensive and defensive skill into winning the Heisman Trophy, and Deion Sanders said he'll "make sure" Hunter plays both sides of the ball in the NFL.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: First baseman Paul Goldschmidt and the Yankees agree to a $12.5 million, 1-year deal, AP source says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — First baseman Paul Goldschmidt and the New York Yankees agreed Saturday to a $12.5 million, one-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bronny James discusses the challenge of dealing with his mental health following cardiac scare
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — The final buzzer sounded Saturday, the South Bay Lakers had won a game and Bronny James seemed completely at ease. Big smile. Handshakes with everyone. Even did a little dance step as he got to the bench.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Marco Rubio's son scores first collegiate touchdown in Florida’s blowout victory over Tulane in bowl game
item.description: Florida running back Anthony Rubio, the son of U.S. Senator Marco Rubio, scored his first collegiate touchdown in Friday's victory over Tulane in the Gasparilla Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: All eyes on Raymond James as Gasparilla Bowl kicks off Friday
item.description: When you hear the word "Gasparilla," you may think of pirates or pirate invasions. But on Friday, think football.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jazz show some fight in 126-119 win over Detroit
item.description: DETROIT (ABC4 Sports) - Collin Sexton scored 30 points, Lauri Markkanen had 27 points and 14 rebounds and the Utah Jazz beat the Detroit Pistons 126-119 on Thursday night for for their second victory in 10 games. Keyonte George added 28 points for Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kucherov has 2 assists as Lightning beat Blues 3-1
item.description: Nikita Kucherov had a pair of assists to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to a 3-1 victory against the St. Louis Blues. Anthony Cirelli, Gage Goncalves and Nick Perbix scored for the Lightning, who have won six of their last seven. Andrei Vasilevskiy finished with 31 saves in the win.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Real Salt Lake's 2025 MLS season kicks off Feb. 22 with away game in San Jose
item.description: Real Salt Lake unveiled its entire 2025 MLS Season on Thursday, along with a few crucial dates such as the club's return to the CONCACAF Champions Cup.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Trevor Baskin: From Division II star to Division I grinder
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — From Division II standout to Division I contributor, Trevor Baskin’s basketball journey has been anything but ordinary. After excelling at Colorado Mesa University, Baskin now competes at the highest level of college basketball with the Colorado Buffaloes.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: NCAA president says there are 'less than 10' transgender athletes in college sports
item.description: NCAA President Charlie Baker said it is “debatable” whether transgender women will “always” have a physical advantage over cisgender, or non-transgender, women.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, NewsNation

item.title: American competitive eater Joey Chestnut named Holiday Bowl Parade Grand Marshall
item.description: World-famous competitive eater Joey Chestnut has been chosen as the 2024 DIRECTV Holiday Bowl "Chief Eggnog Official." He will also serve as the Grand Marshal of the Holiday Bowl Parade.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: Santa Fe Christian 63, Coronado 39
item.description: Boys basketball action taking place at Coronado High School as the Islanders take on #4 ranked Santa Fe Christian.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: A parade, 5K and tailgate party: San Diego ramps up for Holiday Bowl
item.description: With the 45th annual DIRECTV Holiday Bowl matchup between Syracuse and Washington State just about a week away, San Diego is hosting a lineup of events leading up to the big game.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: College hockey player sued by opponent over injury she suffered on the ice
item.description: The lawsuit claims an illegal hit from Crawford during a game on Feb. 19, 2023, has caused her serious long-term issues.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, NewsNation

item.title: NCAA president says there are 'less than 10' transgender athletes in college sports
item.description: NCAA President Charlie Baker told a Senate panel that there are fewer than 10 transgender athletes he is aware of who currently compete in college sports, pouring cold water on an issue Republicans have said is a nationwide problem and one that is increasingly fraught territory for Democrats.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, Fox 5

item.title: Bucs quarterback Baker Mayfield named Offensive Player of the Week
item.description: It was announced on Wednesday that Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield has been named NFC Offensive Player of the Week.
item.dc:creator: Alaina Papazian, WFLA, NBC

item.title: White Sox change name of ballpark to Rate Field
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago White Sox have changed the name of Guaranteed Rate Field to Rate Field. The name change is because the sponsor of the ballpark, Guaranteed Rate, changed their name to Rate.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Tampa native named starting QB for Atlanta Falcons
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Atlanta Falcons are turning to rookie Michael Penix Jr. as their starting quarterback and benching veteran Kirk Cousins as they fight for their first playoff berth since 2017. Coach Raheem Morris announced the decision in a statement Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Guentzel scores in 7 consecutive games, 1 shy of matching the franchise record in Tuesday's win against Blue Jackets
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Nick Paul had a goal and two assists to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to a 5-3 victory over the Columbus Blue Jackets. Jake Guentzel, Luke Glendening, Brayden Point and Mitchell Chaffee also scored for Tampa Bay, which has won five of six. Andrei Vasilevskiy finished with 28 saves.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU excited to face Heisman winner Travis Hunter
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - As BYU continues preparation for the Alamo Bowl December 28th against Colorado, they are looking forward to facing off against Heisman Trophy Winner Travis Hunter. Hunter is truly a one-of-a-kind player.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: White Sox offseason roadmap: How the club could return to being average
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox are coming off the worst season in Major League Baseball history and barring Jerry Reinsdorf going Los Angeles Dodgers mode with his wallet, they will likely be a team that finishes well under .500 again in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers suspend De'Vondre Campbell for 3 games
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco 49ers have suspended linebacker De'Vondre Campbell after he refused to play in Thursday’s game against the Los Angeles Rams, General Manager John Lynch announced Monday. The suspension is for the team's final three games of the season.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Jalen Hurts accounts for 3 TDs and Eagles beat Steelers 27-13 for franchise-best 10th straight win
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Jalen Hurts absorbed the shots when the Eagles' recent anemic passing attack was panned by his own star wide receivers. Hurts and A.J.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Notre Dame and football HC Marcus Freeman agree to long-term extension
item.description: Notre Dame University and football head coach Marcus Freeman have agreed to a long-term contract extension, effectively ending any speculation about him being considered for the Chicago Bears head coaching job.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
